content.content:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  prometheus.yml: |
    global:
      scrape_interval: 30s
    scrape_configs:
      - job_name: "prometheus"
        static_configs:
          - targets: ["localhost:9090"]
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |

input.command: kubectl get deployment prometheus -n monitoring -o yaml | grep -A20 "containers:"

content.content:
containers:
      - args:
        - --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
        - --storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus
        - --web.enable-lifecycle
        image: prom/prometheus:v2.51.2
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: prometheus
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /etc/prometheus/
          name: config
        - mountPath: /prometheus
          name: data
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
